promotion_guardrail: Proposal-side only. Do not promote to A2-1 kernel law from this batch without a later explicit selective promotion pass.

selection_basis.queue_reason: Selected as the next strong bounded Stage16 sims reduction after the mixed-family contract pass and because the parent batch already isolates the local absolute surface seam cleanly.
selection_basis.parent_reason: The parent batch already isolates the standalone absolute baseline surface, local-versus-repo-top admission split, absolute-versus-delta contract split, exact mixed-family baseline-consumer relation, and raw-order terrain8 boundary.
selection_basis.comparison_anchor_reason: The mixed-family A2-mid batch was used for the nearest exact-baseline-consumer packet, while the sim_suite_v1 and sim_suite_v2 A2-mid batches were used as nearby Stage16 descendant version/provenance warning packets.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Deferred to the next bounded step because this pass ends at the terrain8 boundary instead of absorbing the next family.
Not selected because this thread prefers existing intake artifacts over fresh raw-source rereads unless a parent batch proves insufficient.

raw_source_reread_reason: The parent Stage16 absolute-surface batch plus the existing Stage16 mixed-family and descendant-lineage A2-mid anchors were sufficient to isolate the reusable admission-split, contract-split, baseline-consumer, and next-family-boundary packets for this pass.

candidate_items.name: STANDALONE_STAGE16_ABSOLUTE_BASELINE_SURFACE_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent batch's clearest executable family-identity claim before mixed and descendant variants are interpreted.

candidate_items.name: LOCAL_SIM_ID_VERSUS_REPOTOP_DESCENDANT_ADMISSION_SPLIT_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the cleanest compression of the parent batch's main admission contradiction.

candidate_items.name: ABSOLUTE_BASELINE_VERSUS_DELTA_DESCENDANT_CONTRACT_SPLIT_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent batch's sharpest anti-collapse rule for separating absolute baselines from delta descendants.

candidate_items.name: MIX_CONTROL_BASELINE_CONSUMER_WITHOUT_FAMILY_MERGE_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the exact baseline-consumer relation to the mixed family without erasing bounded-family differences.

candidate_items.name: V4_V5_BYTE_IDENTITY_WITHOUT_CURRENT_SURFACE_IDENTITY_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the descendant-side byte-identity warning without collapsing those descendants into the current local absolute surface.

candidate_items.name: TERRAIN8_ADJACENCY_NONMERGE_NEXT_FAMILY_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the cleanest next-family boundary in the parent batch and keeps bounded-batch discipline intact.

quarantined_items.name: RELATED_STAGE16_DESCENDANTS_AS_PROOF_OF_LOCAL_REPOTOP_ADMISSION
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Sibling descendant admission is weaker than current local-surface admission and would erase the parent's negative match for the local SIM_ID.

quarantined_items.name: SAME_STAGE_LATTICE_AS_SAME_OUTPUT_CONTRACT
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Shared lattice structure is weaker than output-contract identity and would incorrectly collapse absolute and delta surfaces together.

quarantined_items.name: EXACT_BASELINE_MATCH_AS_FAMILY_MERGE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Practical baseline identity is weaker than bounded-family identity and would incorrectly merge the absolute batch into the mixed family.

quarantined_items.name: CATALOG_COLOCATION_AS_EVIDENCE_STRENGTH_EQUIVALENCE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Catalog visibility is structural and broader than evidence-pack visibility, so equal evidence strength would overstate the record.

quarantined_items.name: TERRAIN8_SIGN_GAPS_AS_STAGE16_CELL_BEHAVIOR
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The terrain8 suite uses a different metric contract and belongs to the next family rather than the current Stage16 cell lattice.

reasons_for_candidate_status: These candidates isolate the parent batch's strongest reusable Stage16 packets: local absolute surface identity, local-versus-repo-top admission split, absolute-versus-delta contract separation, exact baseline-consumer relation, descendant byte-identity warning, and terrain8 next-family boundary.
They preserve the current Stage16 surface as a contradiction-rich local baseline without letting sibling descendants, baseline reuse, or raw adjacency flatten it into one artifact story.
They remain small, source-linked, contradiction-preserving, and proposal-side for later Stage16 and terrain-family work.
reasons_for_quarantine_status: These items remain evidence-strength overreads, contract-collapse overreads, family-merge overreads, or adjacency overreads rather than clean reusable A2-2 packets.
The parent batch is strong enough to preserve them as warnings, but not to promote them into current law.
notes: Operated from existing intake artifacts after the required control-surface reads already completed earlier in the thread.
Used the Stage16 mixed-family and nearby Stage16 descendant-lineage A2-mid batches as comparison anchors.
No raw core-doc reread was needed for this bounded Stage16 absolute-versus-delta contradiction reprocess pass.
